text: Sam is saving up for a bicycle that costs £100. He saves £10 each week. He has already saved £30. How many more weeks does Sam need to save?
generatorSolution:
Step 1: Find how much Sam still needs to save.
£100 − £30 = £70

Step 2: Find how many weeks it takes to save £70 at £10 per week.
£70 ÷ £10 = 7 weeks

The answer is 7 weeks.
